request: What is the brand-name drug copay?
response: The brand-name copay is 40 USD at retail pharmacies, and mail order gives a three-month supply for two copays.
context: Brand-name prescriptions carry a 40 USD copay at retail pharmacies. The mail-order program provides a three-month supply for the price of two monthly copays.

request: What is the brand-name drug copay?
response: The brand-name copay is 25 USD at retail pharmacies.
context: Brand-name prescriptions carry a 40 USD copay at retail pharmacies.

request: How many physiotherapy sessions am I covered for?
response: You are covered for 20 sessions per calendar year with a referral, and the plan also allows 60 home-care visits.
context: Outpatient physiotherapy is covered up to 20 sessions per calendar year, subject to physician referral. Home health aide services are limited to 60 visits per year.

request: Is teletherapy covered under my plan?
response: Thanks for reaching out. It was a pleasure to assist you today.
context: Teletherapy sessions are covered at no copay.

request: What is the emergency room copay?
response: You will need to call member services at 1-800-555-0142 for that information.
context: Emergency room visits carry a 250 USD copay, waived on inpatient admission.

request: When does the plan year start?
response: Please contact our support team, they will be happy to help with this.
context: The plan year runs from January through December.

request: What is the generic drug copay?
response: The generic copay is 10 USD at retail pharmacies.
context: Generic prescriptions carry a 10 USD copay at retail pharmacies.

request: Is a routine eye exam covered?
response: You will need to speak with an agent about vision benefits.
context: Members are eligible for one routine eye exam per calendar year.

request: How do I order a replacement ID card?
response: Replacement ID cards can be ordered through the member portal at no charge.
context: Members can order replacement ID cards online through the member portal at no charge.

request: Is dental cleaning covered twice a year?
response: Yes, two cleanings per calendar year are covered.
context: Preventive dental care includes two cleanings per calendar year.

request: What is the ER copay if I get admitted?
response: The ER copay is 250 USD and it is waived when the visit ends in inpatient admission.
context: Emergency room visits carry a 250 USD copay, waived on inpatient admission.
